title: Historical record: Android MVP and backend baseline complete
body:
Capture the delivered Android baseline as a permanent project record.

Acceptance criteria:
- Record working Android MVP status
- Record Cloud Run SoP lookup integration
- Record claim starter pack generation
- Record DOCX generation and GCS upload
- Record current release baseline noted in conversation

title: Historical record: Web Claim Starter Pack baseline complete
body:
Capture the delivered web baseline.

Acceptance criteria:
- Record Next.js web scaffold
- Record multi-step flow
- Record validation and field highlighting
- Record autosave/reset
- Record copy/download draft outputs

title: Historical record: Shared Swift core completed on Windows
body:
Capture the shared Swift foundation that exists before native iPhone shell work.

Acceptance criteria:
- Record domain models
- Record business logic
- Record Windows-tested shared core status
- Record that native iPhone shell is still pending

title: Historical record: MAUI baseline restored and verified
body:
Capture the recovered MAUI baseline after rollback.

Acceptance criteria:
- Record rollback to known-good state
- Record successful Windows build
- Record successful Android build
- Record confirmed CQRS slices and claim pack generation

title: Initialize Veteran Connect repo with project history, roadmap and backlog
body:
Create the first committed project-management baseline in the public Veteran Connect repo.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add README
- Add architecture/project history document
- Add backlog/tracker file or folder
- Add guidance on branch strategy and source-of-truth repos

title: Create Veteran Connect GitHub Project structure
body:
Create the actual GitHub Project board and fields for the build.

Acceptance criteria:
- Status field
- Stream field
- Platform field
- Priority field
- Type field
- Confirmed Date field
- Views for Roadmap, Current Sprint, Done History

title: Repair or replace PowerShell issue-to-project import workflow
body:
The previous script run partially succeeded and then failed when content already existed in the project.

Acceptance criteria:
- Prevent duplicate addProjectV2ItemById calls
- Make reruns idempotent
- Log created issues and skipped project items clearly

title: Build Provider Services as a first-class Veteran Connect module
body:
Create the minimum structural foundation so Provider Services can exist as a first-class module.

Acceptance criteria:
- Module shell exists
- Domain model exists
- Storage contracts exist
- Navigation entry point exists
- Placeholder dashboard exists

title: Rebuild dashboard work safely on top of the restored MAUI baseline
body:
Resume dashboard work without breaking the restored claim workflow.

Acceptance criteria:
- Home page remains stable
- No regressions to claim workflow
- Dashboard split or partial pattern is documented
- Changes validated on Windows and Android

title: Fix login/dashboard navigation and preserve new brand styling
body:
Resolve shell/page navigation problems while keeping the new brand look.

Acceptance criteria:
- Login routes resolve correctly
- Dashboard buttons open correct pages
- Styling is preserved
- No crash during navigation

title: Finish Physicians Initial Liability responsive layout cleanup
body:
Stabilise the layout in InitialLiabilityMedicalReportPage.xaml.

Acceptance criteria:
- Wrap-friendly layout in place
- No clipped controls
- Works across common widths
- Existing sections remain intact

title: Align web Claim Starter Pack with DVA portal-style structure
body:
Evolve the web output so it more closely matches the DVA portal claim structure while preserving plain-English outputs.

Acceptance criteria:
- Portal-aligned structure added
- Plain-English draft statement retained
- Evidence gaps retained
- Final output easier to transfer into DVA portal

title: Add richer export options to web starter pack
body:
Add stronger export capability for web users.

Acceptance criteria:
- Decide between TXT/DOCX/PDF/backend export path
- Export output matches latest web structure
- Error handling and validation included

title: Clean up legacy Android namespace remnants
body:
Remove old package naming and legacy leftovers from earlier Android structure.

Acceptance criteria:
- Legacy namespace remnants removed
- Build still passes
- No broken references

title: Clean up Android claims and forms guidance content
body:
Simplify and clean excess guidance text on claims/forms pages.

Acceptance criteria:
- Redundant text removed
- Guidance clearer
- Content matches current product direction

title: Implement unified account management across platforms
body:
Implement sign-up/login that works across web, Android, and future iOS/MAUI.

Acceptance criteria:
- Identity provider chosen
- Shared auth flows documented
- Session/token handling defined
- Platform implementations scheduled

title: Implement subscription and entitlements across platforms
body:
Add subscriptions that work consistently across platforms.

Acceptance criteria:
- Plans defined
- Entitlement model defined
- Platform billing implications documented
- Enforcement points identified

title: Implement security and privacy baseline controls
body:
Move from planning to implementation for privacy/security.

Acceptance criteria:
- Secure auth/storage/transport controls defined and implemented
- Secrets management approach documented
- Audit/logging approach documented
- Consent/data handling rules documented

title: Execute backend migration path toward Azure
body:
Plan and execute backend target-state changes needed for future AI/document workflows.

Acceptance criteria:
- Migration target/state defined
- Existing contracts preserved or versioned
- Rollout plan documented

title: Implement first AI-assisted documentation workflows
body:
Deliver the first AI-supported documentation capability after backend/security prerequisites are in place.

Acceptance criteria:
- First use case selected
- Data flow documented
- Security guardrails applied
- MVP feature implemented

title: Build native iPhone app shell using shared Swift core
body:
Turn the existing shared Swift foundation into a native iPhone app shell.

Acceptance criteria:
- Mac/Xcode environment available
- iOS shell created under ios
- Shared Swift core integrated
- First vertical slice runs on device/simulator

title: Create consolidated architecture and setup documentation
body:
Create one repository-based source of truth for architecture, setup and workstreams.

Acceptance criteria:
- Architecture doc added
- Beginner-friendly setup guides added
- Branch strategy documented
- Platform matrix documented

title: Create regression test plan across core workflows
body:
Document and run a minimum regression set across platforms.

Acceptance criteria:
- Core workflow checklist defined
- MAUI Windows/Android coverage defined
- Web coverage defined
- Android baseline coverage defined
